(slotId: [SlotId](./ts-chocolate-ui.slotid.md)<!-- -->) =&gt; void


</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Callback when user wants to add a new filling option to a slot. If not provided, the "Add filling option" button is hidden. The callback should open a picker and call actions.addFillingOption() with the selected option.

() =&gt; void

_(Optional)_ Callback when user wants to add a new slot. If not provided, the "Add slot" button shows an inline name input. If provided, the callback handles showing the name input UI.
